title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points, and Thijs De Ridder added 15.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's win impacts their tournament standing and reflects their strong performance against a conference rival.
